rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF NORMA MOGANNAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #5, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Court to determine whether to approve fees as requested and whether to approve the request to create an additional conservatorship account as requested in the petition. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LAMBERT GENZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/17/2024 to be calendared with related 850 petition. The following issues must be addressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form. 3) Has the petitioner taken any IAEA actions reportable under CRC 7.250(a)? 4) Has the petitioner given notice of administration to all known or reasonably ascertainable creditors of the decedent, including pubilc entities? 5) All the information required by LRSF 14.35(J)(1) must be provided. Missing information includes whether there are are assignments or powers of attorney that may affect distribution.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WYN WANG LEUNG IRREVOCABLE TRUST DATED APRIL 20, TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the second account has not been amended since the Court settled the first account. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
